goal: Verify that UI and platform implementation roles produce materially different execution evidence that would break under naive consolidation
description: Structural validation that the three implementer execution-report schemas require distinct evidence surfaces. If this scenario were to pass with a single merged schema, it would indicate the roles are safe to consolidate. Currently it asserts they are not.

expected.reason: Roles have UNIQUE delegation payloads, UNIQUE schema output fields, and non-identical tool grants
